name: Study 3: Baseline Characterization — NSAID vs Acetaminophen Initiators in CKD
description: Baseline covariate profile for Study 3 target and comparator cohorts in CKD population.

design_json.description: Baseline characterization comparing NSAID initiators vs acetaminophen initiators in CKD patients. Key features: CKD stage distribution, pain diagnoses, comorbidities (diabetes, hypertension, CHF), concurrent nephrotoxic medications, prior lab values (creatinine, eGFR if available).
